description_long: This is a black Harley-Davidson motorcycle with a muscular, retro-inspired design. The bike features a prominent fuel tank with the Harley-Davidson logo, a single seat, and exposed rear suspension springs in orange. The front end is equipped with a round headlight, side mirrors, and turn signals, while the rear includes a visible license plate and taillight assembly. The wheels are large, with disc brakes and multi-spoke rims, and the exhaust system is finished in black. The overall build is robust, with a combination of metal and rubber components, and the motorcycle is designed for urban and highway riding.
description: A black Harley-Davidson motorcycle with orange rear springs, a single seat, and a retro-modern design featuring a round headlight and blacked-out exhaust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlight, handlebars with mirrors, and the front wheel aligned straight.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the Harley-Davidson logo, orange rear suspension, and the full profile of the seat and exhaust.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the license plate, taillight, and the back wheel with visible suspension.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the engine, black exhaust, and the overall streamlined profile of the motorcycle.
